briefdescription.para: This function extracts the 3D information from the Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VSIF payload.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_3D_Info instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the 3D format from XVidC_3DInfo and returns a XV_HdmiTx_3D_Struct_Field type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVidC_3DInfo instance.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the sampling method info from XVidC_3DInfo and returns a XV_HdmiTx_3D_Sampling_Method type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVidC_3DInfo instance.

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the sampling position info from XVidC_3DInfo and returns a XV_HdmiTx_3D_Sampling_Position type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVidC_3DInfo instance.

briefdescription.para: This function converts a XV_HdmiTx_3D_Struct_Field type to a XVidC_3DFormat type.
This function converts a XV_HdmiTx_3D_Sampling_Method type to a XVidC_3DSamplingMethod type.
This function converts a XV_HdmiTx_3D_Sampling_Position type to a XVidC_3DSamplingPosition type.
This function parses a Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Rx_Aux instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_VSIF instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during parsing

briefdescription.para: This function generates a Vendor Specific InfoFrame (VSIF).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_VSIF instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_Tx_Aux instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if an error was detected during generation

briefdescription.para: This function displays the contents of an XV_HdmiTx_VSIF instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTx_VSIF instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiTx_3D_Struct_Field.
This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiTx_3D_Sampling_Method.
This function returns a string representation of the enumerated type XV_HdmiTx_3D_Sampling_Position.
Contains function definitions related to Vendor Specific InfoFrames used in HDMI.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmitx_vsif.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 yh 15/01/15 Initial release for 3D video support 1.01 YH 19/07/17 Clean up Print Statement line ending to "\r\n" 2.00 EB 23/01/18 This file is deprecated. All the APIs are now moved to HDMI Common library
